## 变更说明 / Description

<!-- 简要描述本次 PR 做了什么，修正了哪个文档或新增了哪个工作流 -->
<!-- Briefly describe what this PR does: which document was corrected or which workflow was added -->

## 变更类型 / Change Type

<!-- 勾选适用项 / Check all that apply -->

- [ ] 修正字段名 / Field name correction
- [ ] 修正文档错误 / Documentation fix
- [ ] 新增工作流或查询模板 / New workflow or query template
- [ ] 新增字段文档 / New field documentation
- [ ] 排版/格式优化 / Formatting improvement

## 内容验证 / Content Verification

- [ ] 字段名已在真实 K3Cloud 实例中验证 / Field names verified against a real K3Cloud instance
- [ ] 示例数据使用虚构值（如 `MAT001`、`CUST001`），未包含真实业务数据 / Examples use fictional data (e.g. `MAT001`, `CUST001`), no real business data

## 质量检查 / Quality Checks

- [ ] 已运行 `make lint`（markdownlint 无报错）/ Ran `make lint` (markdownlint clean)

## CHANGELOG

- [ ] 已在 `CHANGELOG.md` 的 `[Unreleased]` 区段添加条目（如适用）/ Added entry to `[Unreleased]` section in `CHANGELOG.md` (if applicable)
